name: AntiFrameEdit
author: JonyGamesYT9
readme_markdown:
[![](https://poggit.pmmp.io/shield.state/AntiFrameEdit)]

AntiFrameEdit | v5.0

A plugin so that players on your server cannot use Frames.

⚡ Features:

  • Personalized messages.
  • Easy to usage.
  • Multiworld support.
  • Permissions for players to use the frames.
  • PocketMine-MP 4.0.0 (Only).

✒ Permissions:

| Permission | Description | | --- | --- | | `antiframeedit.remove.bypass` | Allows a user to remove items in a frame. | | `antiframeedit.place.bypass` | Allows a user to put an item in any frame. |

📋 Icon:

Icon Credits: https://minecraft-archive.fandom.com/wiki/Item_Frame

📖 Project information:

| Plugin Version | Pocketmine API | PHP Version | Plugin Status | |---|---|---|---| | 5.0 | 4.0.0 | 8 | Completed |
